hero.title: Dandalin Ciniki na Dabbobi Kai Tsaye
hero.subtitle: Dandalin cinikin dabbobi masu rai mafi inganci. Sayi kuma sayar da shanu da tumakinka lafiya.

secure.title: Siyayya Mai Tsaro
secure.description: Duk ma'amaloli suna da tsaro. An tabbatar da bayanan mai siyarwa da mai siye.

variety.title: Faɗin Samfura
variety.description: Shanu, tumaki, da sauransu. Nemo dabbar da kake nema cikin sauƙi.

support.title: Tallafi 24/7
support.description: Muna nan koyaushe don neman tambayoyinku. Layin tallafinmu kai tsaye yana aiki.

cta.title: Fara Yanzu
cta.subtitle: Ku zauna a kan dandamali inda dubban masu siyarwa da masu siye ke haɗuwa.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Ciniki da Dabbobi. An kiyaye duk haƙƙoƙi.
footer.newsletterDescription: Kada ku rasa sabbin jerin abubuwa da kuma tallace-tallace.
footer.tagline: Dandalin cinikin dabbobi masu rai mafi inganci a Turkiyya.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Shiga tare da Apple zai fara aiki nan ba da jimawa ba.
footer.faq: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi akai-akai

faq.title: Tambayoyin da Ake Yawan Yi
faq.description: Amsoshin tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da dandalinmu.
faq.noFaqs: Ba a ƙara wasu tambayoyi ba tukuna.

about.title: game da Mu
about.subtitle: Dandalin cinikin dabbobi masu rai mafi inganci a Turkiyya.

mission.title: Manufarmu
mission.description: Ta hanyar ƙirƙirar kasuwancin dabbobi masu rai ta hanyar dijital, muna da niyyar ƙirƙirar hanyar haɗi mai aminci, gaskiya, da inganci tsakanin masu samarwa da masu siye.

vision.title: Hangenmu na Gaba
vision.description: Don zama jagora a cikin sauye-sauyen dijital a fannin noma da kuma zama dandamali na duniya a fannin cinikin dabbobi kai tsaye.

trust.title: Dogara
trust.description: Gaskiya da aminci suna da matuƙar muhimmanci a duk wani ciniki.

quality.title: Inganci
quality.description: Ci gaba da ingantawa don samar da mafi kyawun sabis.

innovation.title: Ƙirƙira-kirkire
innovation.description: Canza masana'antar ta hanyar amfani da fasaha.

stats.users: Mai Amfani da aka Yi Rijista

contact.title: Sadarwa
contact.subtitle: Da fatan za a tuntuɓe mu idan kuna da wasu tambayoyi.

form.title: Rubuta mana
form.name: Sunanka
form.subject: Maudu'i
form.success: An aika saƙonka cikin nasara. Za mu dawo muku da wuri-wuri.
form.error: An sami kuskure yayin aika saƙon. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

acceptance.title: 1. Karɓar Sharuɗɗan
acceptance.content: Ta hanyar amfani da wannan gidan yanar gizon, kun yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗan amfani. Idan ba ku yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗan ba, don Allah kada ku yi amfani da shafin.

services.title: 2. Ayyuka
services.content: Kasuwancin Dabbobi yana samar da dandamali don siye da sayar da dabbobi masu rai. Duk wani ciniki a kan dandamali alhakin mai amfani ne.

accounts.title: 3. Asusun Mai Amfani
accounts.content: Dole ne ka samar da sahihan bayanai na zamani domin ƙirƙirar asusu. Tsaron asusunka alhakinka ne.

prohibited.title: 4. Ayyukan da aka Haramta
prohibited.content: An haramta tallace-tallacen da ba su dace ba, bayanai na ƙarya, zamba, da ayyukan da ba bisa ƙa'ida ba.

liability.title: 5. Iyakance Alhaki
liability.content: Dandalin ba shi da alhakin kai tsaye kan mu'amala tsakanin masu amfani. Duk mu'amala tana faruwa ne tsakanin ɓangarorin.

changes.title: 6. Canje-canje
changes.content: Waɗannan sharuɗɗa da ƙa'idodi za su iya canzawa ba tare da sanarwa ba. Canje-canjen za su fara aiki nan da nan bayan an buga su.

collection.title: 1. Tattara Bayanai
collection.content: Idan ka ƙirƙiri asusu, muna tattara bayanan sirri kamar sunanka, adireshin imel, da lambar waya. Haka nan za mu iya tattara bayanai marasa suna game da amfani da shafin.

usage.title: 2. Amfani da Bayani
usage.content: Ana amfani da bayanan da muke tattarawa don samar da ayyukanmu, sarrafa asusunka, tabbatar da tsaro, da kuma bayar da tayi na musamman.

sharing.title: 3. Raba Bayanai
sharing.content: Ba za a sayar ko haya bayananka na sirri ga wasu ba. Ba za a raba bayananka ba sai dai don dalilai na doka.

security.title: 4. Tsaro
security.content: An tsara matakan tsaro na masana'antu don kare bayananka.

cookies.title: 5. Kukis
cookies.content: Shafin yanar gizon mu yana amfani da kukis don inganta ƙwarewar mai amfani. Kuna iya sarrafa fifikon kukis ɗinku a cikin saitunan burauzar ku.

rights.title: 6. Haƙƙoƙinka
rights.content: A ƙarƙashin Dokar Kare Bayanan Sirri na Turkiyya (KVKK), kuna da haƙƙin samun dama, gyara, da goge bayanan sirrinku.

metadata.title: Cinikin Dabbobi - Dandalin Ciniki na Dabbobi Kai Tsaye
metadata.description: Dandalin cinikin dabbobi kai tsaye mafi aminci a duniya. Sayayya da sayarwar dabbobi lafiya da gaskiya.

about.title: game da Mu
about.description: Koyi game da Ciniki da Dabbobi. Dandalin cinikin dabbobi masu rai mai inganci.
about.keywords: about livestock trading, live animal platform, livestock trading company, trusted animal market

contact.title: Sadarwa
contact.description: Tuntube mu. Ƙungiyar tallafawa abokan ciniki ta Ciniki da Dabbobi a shirye take ta taimaka muku.
contact.keywords: livestock trading contact, animal trading support, customer service

terms.title: Sharuɗɗan Amfani
terms.description: Sharuɗɗa da Ka'idojin Ciniki da Dabbobi.
terms.keywords: terms of use, livestock trading rules, platform conditions

privacy.title: takardar kebantawa
privacy.description: Manufar sirri ta Ciniki da Dabbobi. Koyi yadda ake kare bayanan sirrinku.
privacy.keywords: privacy policy, personal data protection, GDPR, livestock trading privacy

products.title: Kayayyaki
products.description: Duba jerin dabbobi kai tsaye. Tallace-tallace masu inganci ga shanu, tumaki, da sauransu.
products.keywords: live animal listings, cattle for sale, sheep for sale, goats for sale, livestock listings, poultry listings, animal market

sellers.title: Masu siyarwa
sellers.description: Gano masu sayar da dabbobi masu inganci. Bayanan martaba da sake dubawa na masu siyarwa da aka tabbatar.
sellers.keywords: animal sellers, trusted sellers, verified seller profiles, live animal sellers

transporters.title: masu jigilar kaya
transporters.description: Gano kamfanonin jigilar dabbobi. Sufurin dabbobi masu rai lafiya da ƙwarewa.
transporters.keywords: animal transport, livestock carriers, live animal transportation, animal shipping

search.title: Bincika
search.description: Bincika tsakanin jerin dabbobi masu rai. Bincike mai sauƙi tare da zaɓuɓɓukan tacewa da rarrabuwa.
search.keywords: animal search, livestock search, find animals, animal filter

faq.title: Tambayoyin da Ake Yawan Yi
faq.description: Tambayoyi da amsoshi da ake yawan yi game da cinikin dabbobi.
faq.keywords: FAQ, livestock trading questions, animal trading help

productDetail.title: {title} - Na Siyarwa
productDetail.description: Ana sayarwa a {title} - {city}. Danna don cikakkun bayanai da bayanan tuntuɓar.

sellerDetail.title: {suna} - Bayanin Mai Siyarwa
sellerDetail.description: Bayanin mai siyarwa na {name}. Sharhi, jerin abubuwa, da bayanan tuntuɓar.

transporterDetail.title: {suna} - Bayanin Mai Jigilar Kaya
transporterDetail.description: Bayanin mai jigilar kaya na {name}. Wuraren sabis, bita, da bayanan tuntuɓar.

home.title: Live Animal Trading Platform | Trusted Livestock Trading
home.description: The world's most trusted live animal trading platform. Buy and sell cattle, sheep, goats and more safely. Verified sellers, transparent prices.
home.keywords: live animal sale, animal trading platform, cattle sale, sheep sale, goat sale, livestock, poultry, online animal market, trusted livestock trading, animal listings

pricing.title: Pricing | Membership Plans
pricing.description: Livestock Trading membership plans and pricing. Highlight your animal listings with free and premium packages.
pricing.keywords: pricing, membership plans, premium membership, animal listing price, boost package

metadata.keywords: live animal, livestock trading, animal buying selling, cattle sale, sheep sale, goat sale, livestock, poultry, farm animals, animal market, online animal sale
